text: Being here fills me with a sense of curiosity and quiet intrigue. The sterile modernity and transparency of the meeting space evoke both anticipation and slight discomfort—human connection feels observed and fragile behind glass. Moving into the R+D exhibition, I sense an energetic pulse—innovation, research, and creative minds converging. The displays ask me to reflect on humanity’s relationship with technology. Words on the screen resonate—I find myself standing, as if at the border between machine and meaning, a contemplative observer among the artifacts of progress. I feel both odd and at home, caught in wonder.
